name: Coya Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing proprietary new therapies to enhance the function of regulatory T cells (Tregs). Our core focus is developing therapies to target Treg dysfunction. Our lead asset, COYA 302, is a Treg-enhancing biologic.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing proprietary new therapies to enhance the function of regulatory T cells (Tregs).

catalysts.event: Anticipate completing enrollment in ALSTARS trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate completing enrollment in the ALLSTARS trial in second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA accepted IND for COYA 302 for FTD
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we announced that the FDA accepted our IND for COYA 302 for the treatment of frontotemporal dementia (FTD).

catalysts.event: Completed financing with $11.1M gross proceeds from Dr. Reddy's
catalysts.sentence: In January of 2026, we completed a financing with $11.1 million in gross proceeds, $10 million of which was provided by Dr Reddy's Laboratories, Inc.

In December of 2025, we announced that dosing of ALS patients in the Company s ALSTARS Trial of COYA 302, a Phase 2, randomized, multi-center, double-blind, placebo-controlled study to evaluate the efficacy and safety of COYA 302 for the treatment of ALS (ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT 07161999), had commenced.

catalysts.event: FDA accepted IND for COYA 302 for ALS
catalysts.sentence: In August of 2025, we announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) accepted our Investigational New Drug (IND) application for COYA 302.

catalysts.event: Announced expansion of pipeline with COYA 303
catalysts.sentence: In January of 2025 we announced expansion of our investigational pipeline with a new product candidate called COYA 303 for the treatment of inflammatory diseases.
